title: podinfo values
description: Top-level keys are pinned (additionalProperties:false) so a renamed, moved, or removed key in a values override fails loudly at `helm template` time - the SemVer contract guard described in the GitOps repo's docs/promoting-chart-upgrades.md. Per-key schemas are intentionally permissive so this never rejects a valid nested override; tighten individual keys as your platform standardises them.
